results.rendered_html: asāṃprata (3. a + sāṃ˚) adj. nicht angemessen, unpassend: tadapaśyamahaṃ bhrāturasāṃpratamanuvrajan  MBH. 1,6371 . avidhāya vivāhasatkriyāmanayorgamyata ityasāṃpratam  RAGH. 8,60 . viṣavṛkṣo 'pi saṃvardhya svayaṃ chettumasāṃpratam  PAÑCAT. I, 275  = 469  (saṃvṛddhaḥ) =  KUMĀRAS. 2,55 .  SIDDH. K. _zu_ P. 2,3,1 .

results.rendered_html:
asāṃprata a. Unfit, unbecoming, improper; anācakṣāṇayā'sāṃprataṃ kṛtaṃ  M. 5. 
— taṃ ind. Improperly, unfitly; oft. used with an adjectival force = asāṃprata; viṣavṛkṣo'pi saṃvardhya svayaṃ chettumasāṃprataṃ  Ku. 2. 55 ; saṃpratyasāṃprataṃ vaktumukte musalapāṇinā  Śi. 2. 71.   R. 8. 61 ;  Pt. 1. 245.
